(404)PETITIONER APPEARED WITH COUNSEL, WAS AFFIRMED, AND TESTIFIED ON HIS OWN BEHALF. RESPONDENT APPEARED WITH COUNSEL, WAS AFFIRMED, AND TESTIFIED ON HER OWN BEHALF.
PARTIES WERE ORDERED TO FAMILY COURT SERVICES FOR MEDIATION AND RETURNED. PARTIES AGREE THAT THEY WILL SHARE LEGAL AND PHYSICAL CUSTODY JOINTLY.
HICH THE FATHER WILL OCCUPY THE RESIDENCE. THERE WILL BE WEDNESDAY EVENING VISITS FROM 5:30 P.M. UNTIL 8:00 P.M. NEITHER PARTY WILL CONSUME ALCOHOL
. THE FATHER SHALL HAVE THE CHILDREN ON NOVEMBER 25 AFTER SCHOOL UNTIL 11:00 A.M. ON THANKSGIVING DAY. PARTIES AGREE TO MUTUAL NO CONTACT AND
FF ABOUT PARENT COUNSELING AND REPORT BACK TO FAMILY COURT SERVICES MEDIATOR MARCY S. BELL BY THE END OF NOVEMBER 1998. THE MOTHER WILL MAINTAIN
